title: Color Theme - Switching theme while Phone is set to Dark Theme
scenario: Verify that switching between color themes (Follow Phone Theme, Light, Dark) applies immediately, persists across app restarts, and re-selecting the active theme has no effect.
steps: 2. Open the app and ensure the theme is set to default (Follow Phone Theme).
3. Change the app theme to Light.
4. Verify the Light theme displays correctly throughout the app.
6. Confirm the Light theme setting is still active after restart.
7. Change the app theme to Dark.
8. Verify the Dark theme displays correctly throughout the app.
10. Confirm the Dark theme setting is still active after restart.
11. Re-select the currently active theme (e.g., tap Dark again while Dark is already selected).
12. Verify that re-selecting the same theme has no visible effect (no change in appearance).
expected: The selected theme (Light or Dark) is applied immediately, displays correctly throughout the app, and persists across app restarts. Re-selecting the currently active theme has no effect.
